name: Xray Gateway
postCreateCommand: wget -q https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core/releases/latest/download/Xray-linux-64.zip && unzip -q Xray-linux-64.zip -d xray && rm Xray-linux-64.zip && cd xray && echo '{"inbounds":[{"port":8080,"listen":"127.0.0.1","protocol":"vless","settings":{"clients":[{"id":"a4e43fc7-e69e-404c-bfa2-cd12ac9a7dcf"}],"decryption":"none"},"streamSettings":{"network":"ws","wsSettings":{"path":"/ws"}}}],"outbounds":[{"protocol":"freedom"}]}' > config.json && chmod +x xray && nohup ./xray run -c config.json > /dev/null 2>&1 &
